news.title: Crypto's great hope in Senate's Clarity Act still has a path to survive tight calendar
news.summary: A sideshow stablecoin yield debate has dragged the market structure bill through months of delay, even as the Senate's available floor time diminishes for 2026.

news.title: Inside the hunt for Satoshi: Filmmakers chase crypto’s biggest mystery
news.summary: A new documentary digs into Bitcoin’s origins, reframing the search for Satoshi Nakamoto as both a technical investigation and a deeply human story.

news.title: New York sues Coinbase, Gemini over prediction market offerings
news.summary: New York has become the latest state to argue that prediction market contracts touching on sports and entertainment violate state gambling laws.
